name: New Relic
description: Monitor New Relic alert policies, APM applications, and notification channels for observability compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to New Relic One (one.newrelic.com)
2. Click your user icon > API keys
3. Click 'Create a key' and select type 'User'
4. Copy and paste the key below

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Create a User API Key under your New Relic profile > API keys

checks.name: Monitoring & Alerting
checks.description: Verifies that New Relic alert policies are configured

checks.name: Utility Monitoring
checks.description: Verifies that applications are instrumented in New Relic APM

checks.name: Incident Response
checks.description: Verifies that New Relic alert channels are configured for incident notifications
